25.reason: The space after %d causes the program to read an extra character, potentially skipping input or causing incorrect reading. It should be scanf("%d", &a);

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  The space after %d causes the program to read an extra character, potentially skipping input or causing incorrect reading. It should be scanf("%d", &a);
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The format string "%d " has a trailing space, which causes scanf to consume the next integer after the last input, leading to incorrect reading of the end-of-operations marker -1. Change to "%d" without the space.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The space after %d in scanf causes it to skip whitespace indefinitely, potentially consuming the -1 terminator prematurely or causing input parsing issues. It should be just "%d".]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The space after %d in scanf causes it to skip whitespace indefinitely, potentially consuming the -1 terminator prematurely or causing input parsing issues. It should be scanf("%d", &a); without the trailing space.]
